title: gahnia lacera
intro: Gahnia lacera, also known as Saw-sedge or Saw Sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The medicinal properties of Gahnia lacera are attributed to its rhizome, which has been traditionally used in Australian Aboriginal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and colds. The health benefits of Gahnia lacera include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Gahnia lacera can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
